name: video-ai-engineer
description: AI Engineer Bootcamp · 60s 竖版短片（Remotion + 13 张 xhs 海报）

scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts ShortVideo out/ai-engineer-short.mp4 && echo '✓ MP4 ready at out/ai-engineer-short.mp4 — run bun run upload to push to S3'
scripts.upload: aws s3 cp out/ai-engineer-short.mp4 s3://jr-image/video/ai-engineer-short.mp4 --content-type video/mp4 --acl public-read --cache-control 'public, max-age=31536000' --region ap-southeast-2 && echo '✓ Uploaded to https://jr-image.s3.ap-southeast-2.amazonaws.com/video/ai-engineer-short.mp4'
scripts.pipeline: bun run scripts/export-xhs-to-images.mjs && bun run scripts/gen-voiceover.mjs && bun run scripts/sync-scenes-to-voiceover.mjs && bun run render
